PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Fenton, via Zoom, for Trevor Timm, Administrator.

Counsel reports of the Maltese government's ongoing investigation into the decedent's assassination.

After brief, additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-16-2020 Continued To Oct-28-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alexandra Moss appeared by zoom for Peter Galizia (Heir) and Trevor Timm (Administrator).
Joseph Fenton also by zoom.

The Court asked if there was any chance of getting a petition for approval of report on status of administration filed in the next three weeks. Mr. Fenton stated that the chance is next to zero, apologized to the Court for not giving it a report, stated that the Decedent was a Journalist and was assassinated in Malta and that the asset they are trying to secure is the Decedent's final writing from Google. Mr. Fenton also stated that they had sent notice to Google, that they received no cooperation, that time passed and that they filed discovery with Google, but the government of Malta asked Google to block the account. In addition, Mr. Fenton stated that there is an ongoing investigation into her assassination, that they are looking at the least another year to get Malta to release this, that Google was of the position that there was suspicious activity on the account after the death of the Decedent and that it was the government of Malta who cloned the Decedent's phone. The Court instructed Mr. Fenton to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Status on close of estate is continued to October 28, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Fenton is to have his petition filed and served one week prior.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.

PETITION Petition For Letters Of Administration And Order To Produce Decedent'S Google Account Contents
Off Calendar Feb-25-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Rosenbloom and Joseph Fenton for Peter Galizia.

Mr. Fenton stated that there is no estate in Malta to his knowledge. Mr. Rosenbloom stated that the property of the decedent other than this account are in Malta and that Google wants an order from a United States Court. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration and Order to Produce Decedent's Google Account Contents (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
